---
title: "Model Context Protocol (MCP)"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Model Context Protocol (MCP)

## Qu'est-ce que MCP ?

MCP est un **standard ouvert** (publié par Anthropic, novembre 2024) pour connecter les LLMs à des sources de données et outils externes. Il standardise l'interface entre les agents IA et les ressources externes.

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    subgraph "MCP Architecture"
        HOST["MCP Host<br/>Claude Code, Cline"] -->|MCP Protocol| CLIENT[MCP Client]
        CLIENT -->|stdio/SSE| SERVER1["MCP Server<br/>Filesystem"]
        CLIENT -->|stdio/SSE| SERVER2["MCP Server<br/>PostgreSQL"]
        CLIENT -->|stdio/SSE| SERVER3["MCP Server<br/>GitHub API"]
    end
    
    style HOST fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
    style CLIENT fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
```

## Primitives MCP

| Primitive | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| **Tools** | Action | Fonctions exécutables (query DB, search, compute) |
| **Resources** | Données | Données lisibles (files, DB schemas, configs) |
| **Prompts** | Template | Templates de prompts réutilisables |

## Transport

| Transport | Description | Cas d'usage |
|-----------|-------------|------------|
| **stdio** | Communication via stdin/stdout | Local (même machine) |
| **SSE** | Server-Sent Events | Remote, HTTP-based |
| **Streamable HTTP** | HTTP bidirectionnel | Remote, production |

## MCP Servers populaires

| Server | Fonction | Repo |
|--------|----------|------|
| Filesystem | Accès fichiers | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem` |
| PostgreSQL | Query DB | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres` |
| GitHub | Issues, PRs, repos | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-github` |
| Brave Search | Web search | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search` |
| Memory | KV store persistant | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory` |
| Puppeteer | Browser automation | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-puppeteer` |
| Slack | Messages, channels | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-slack` |
| Google Drive | Docs, sheets | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-google-drive` |

## Écrire un MCP Server

### Python (FastMCP)

```python
from mcp.server import Server
from mcp.types import Tool, TextContent

server = Server("my-tools")

@server.list_tools()
async def list_tools():
    return [Tool(
        name="get_weather",
        description="Get weather for a city",
        inputSchema={
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {"city": {"type": "string"}},
            "required": ["city"]
        }
    )]

@server.call_tool()
async def call_tool(name, arguments):
    if name == "get_weather":
        city = arguments["city"]
        # ... fetch weather ...
        return [TextContent(type="text", text=f"Weather in {city}: 22°C")]
```

### Configuration dans Claude Code

```json
// ~/.claude/claude_desktop_config.json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "filesystem": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "/path/to/dir"]
    },
    "postgres": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres"],
      "env": {"DATABASE_URL": "postgresql://..."}
    }
  }
}
```

## Adoption

| Client | MCP Support | Version min |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| Claude Code | ✅ Natif | v1.0 |
| Cline | ✅ Natif | v3.0 |
| Goose | ✅ Natif | v1.0 |
| Cursor | ✅ | v0.42 |
| Continue.dev | ✅ | v0.9 |
| Windsurf | ✅ | Récent |
| Zed | ✅ | v0.165 |

::: callout-tip
## MCP comme standard universel
MCP devient le **standard de facto** pour connecter les agents IA aux outils externes. Un MCP server écrit une fois fonctionne avec tous les clients MCP. Équivalent de ce que LSP a été pour les IDE.
:::

## MCP Servers découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_MCP_START -->
### [mindsdb/mindsdb](https://github.com/mindsdb/mindsdb)
Connect and unify data across various platforms and databases with MindsDB as a single MCP server.

⭐ 39.4k | `Makefile` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `anton`, `artificial-inteligence`, `claude`, `claude-cowork`, `codex`, `cowork`

### [microsoft/playwright-mcp](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-mcp)
Official Microsoft Playwright MCP server, enabling LLMs to interact with web pages through structured accessibility snapshots

⭐ 35.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `mcp`, `playwright`

### [GPT Researcher](https://github.com/assafelovic/gpt-researcher)
GPT Researcher is an autonomous agent designed for comprehensive online research on a variety of tasks. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 28.3k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `automation`, `deepresearch`, `llms`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `python`

### [eyaltoledano/claude-task-master](https://github.com/eyaltoledano/claude-task-master)
📇 ☁️ 🏠 - AI-powered task management system for AI-driven development. Features PRD parsing, task expansion, multi-provider support (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Perplexity, xAI), and selective tool load...

⭐ 27.8k | `JavaScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `cursor`, `cursor-ai`, `cursorai`, `lovable`, `lovable-dev`, `roocode`, `task-manager`

### [fastmcp](https://github.com/PrefectHQ/fastmcp)
🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

⭐ 26.1k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agents`, `fastmcp`, `llms`, `mcp`, `mcp-clients`, `mcp-servers`, `mcp-tools`, `model-context-protocol`

### [ahujasid/blender-mcp](https://github.com/ahujasid/blender-mcp)
🐍 - MCP server for working with Blender

⭐ 23.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11

### [mcp-for-beginners](https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners)
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed ...

⭐ 16.7k | `Jupyter Notebook` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `csharp`, `java`, `javascript`, `javascript-applications`, `mcp`, `mcp-client`, `mcp-security`, `mcp-server`

### [GLips/Figma-Context-MCP](https://github.com/GLips/Figma-Context-MCP)
📇 🏠 - Provide coding agents direct access to Figma data to help them one-shot design implementation.

⭐ 15.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `cursor`, `figma`, `mcp`, `typescript`

### [mcp-use](https://github.com/mcp-use/mcp-use)
The fullstack MCP framework to develop MCP Apps for ChatGPT / Claude & MCP Servers for AI Agents.

⭐ 10.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agentic-framework`, `ai`, `apps-sdk`, `chatgpt`, `claude-code`, `claude-connectors`, `llms`, `mcp`

### [awslabs/mcp](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp)
🎖️ ☁️ - AWS MCP servers for seamless integration with AWS services and resources.

⭐ 9.4k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `aws`, `mcp`, `mcp-client`, `mcp-clients`, `mcp-host`, `mcp-server`, `mcp-servers`, `mcp-tools`

### [wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP](https://github.com/wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP)
📇 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - A swiss-army-knife that can manage/execute programs and read/write/search/edit code and text files.

⭐ 7.7k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `code-analysis`, `code-generation`, `gemini-cli-extension`, `mcp`, `terminal-ai`, `terminal-automation`

### [firecrawl-mcp-server](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server)
🔥 Official Firecrawl MCP Server - Adds powerful web scraping and search to Cursor, Claude and any other LLM clients.

⭐ 6.9k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `batch-processing`, `claude`, `content-extraction`, `data-collection`, `firecrawl`, `firecrawl-ai`, `javascript-rendering`, `llm-tools`

### [browsermcp/mcp](https://github.com/browsermcp/mcp)
📇 🏠 - Automate your local Chrome browser

⭐ 6.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `browser-automation`, `browser-extension`, `claude`, `cursor`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`

### [XcodeBuildMCP](https://github.com/getsentry/XcodeBuildMCP)
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and CLI that provides tools for agent use when working on iOS and macOS projects.

⭐ 6.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `model-context-protocol`, `model-context-protocol-servers`, `tag-production`, `xcode`, `xcodebuild`

### [lharries/whatsapp-mcp](https://github.com/lharries/whatsapp-mcp)
🐍 🏎️ - An MCP server for searching your personal WhatsApp messages, contacts and sending messages to individuals or groups

⭐ 5.9k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `mcp`, `whatsapp`, `whatsapp-api`

### [awesome-mcp-servers](https://github.com/appcypher/awesome-mcp-servers)
Awesome MCP Servers - A curated list of Model Context Protocol servers

⭐ 5.7k | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `anthropic-claude`, `awesome`, `context`, `mcp`, `model-context-protocol`, `servers`, `tool-use`

### [semble](https://github.com/MinishLab/semble)
Fast and Accurate Code Search for Agents. Uses ~98% fewer tokens than grep+read

⭐ 5.6k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agents`, `code-search`, `embeddings`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `model-context-protocol`, `retrieval`

### [executeautomation/playwright-mcp-server](https://github.com/executeautomation/mcp-playwright)
📇 - An MCP server using Playwright for browser automation and webscrapping

⭐ 5.6k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-08

### [mobile-next/mobile-mcp](https://github.com/mobile-next/mobile-mcp)
📇 🏠 🐧 🍎 - MCP Server for Android/iOS application and device automation, development and app scraping. Simulator/Emulator/Physical devices like iPhone, Google Pixel, Samsung supported.

⭐ 5.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agent`, `android`, `emulator`, `ios`, `mcp`, `mobile`, `physical`, `real`

### [21st-dev/Magic-MCP](https://github.com/21st-dev/magic-mcp)
Create crafted UI components inspired by the best 21st.dev design engineers.

⭐ 5.4k | `TypeScript` | MAJ: 2026-07-11

### [bram2w/baserow](https://github.com/bram2w/baserow)
Baserow database integration with table search, list, and row create, read, update, and delete capabilities.

⭐ 5.3k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `airtable`, `airtable-alternative`, `airtable-replacement`, `application-builder`, `automations`, `dashboards`, `database`, `low-code`

### [5ire](https://github.com/nanbingxyz/5ire)
5ire is a cross-platform desktop AI assistant, MCP client. It compatible with major service providers, supports local knowledge base and tools via model context protocol servers .

⭐ 5.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `knowledge-base`, `llms`, `mcp`, `mcp-client`, `model-context-protocol`

### [txn2/kubefwd](https://github.com/txn2/kubefwd)
🏎️ 🏠 - Kubernetes bulk port forwarding with service discovery, /etc/hosts management, traffic monitoring, and pod log streaming

⭐ 4.1k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `api-rest`, `developer-tools`, `devops`, `devops-tools`, `devtools`, `k8s`, `kubefwd`, `kubernetes`

### [cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare](https://github.com/cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare)
🎖️ 📇 ☁️ - Integration with Cloudflare services including Workers, KV, R2, and D1

⭐ 3.9k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10

### [shashankss1205/codegraphcontext](https://github.com/Shashankss1205/CodeGraphContext)
🐍 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 An MCP server that indexes local code into a graph database to provide context to AI assistants with a graphical code visualizations for humans.

⭐ 3.9k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `hacktoberfest2025`, `social-winter-of-code`

### [dagger/container-use](https://github.com/dagger/container-use)
🏎️ 🏠 🐧 🍎 🪟 - Containerized environments for coding agents. Multiple agents can work independently, isolated in fresh containers and git branches. No conflicts, many experiments. Full execution hist...

⭐ 3.9k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-09

### [browserbase/mcp-server-browserbase](https://github.com/browserbase/mcp-server-browserbase)
🎖️ 📇 - Automate browser interactions in the cloud (e.g. web navigation, data extraction, form filling, and more)

⭐ 3.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `ai`, `browser`, `chrome`, `chromium`, `mcp`, `playwright`, `puppeteer`

### [callstackincubator/agent-device](https://github.com/callstackincubator/agent-device)
!callstackincubator/agent-device MCP server 📇 🏠 🍎 🐧 - Discovery router for the agent-device CLI. Exposes status, install guidance, version-matched help, prompts, and resources for iOS, Android, tvO...

⭐ 3.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `adb`, `agentic-ai`, `agents`, `ai-agents`, `android-emulator`, `automation`, `e2e-testing`, `expo`

### [crystaldba/postgres-mcp](https://github.com/crystaldba/postgres-mcp)
🐍 🏠 - All-in-one MCP server for Postgres development and operations, with tools for performance analysis, tuning, and health checks

⭐ 3.0k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11

### [Jpisnice/shadcn-ui-mcp-server](https://github.com/Jpisnice/shadcn-ui-mcp-server)
📇 🏠 - MCP server that gives AI assistants seamless access to shadcn/ui v4 components, blocks, demos, and metadata.

⭐ 2.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `expo`, `mcp`, `modelcontextprotocol`, `nextjs`, `npm`, `npm-package`, `npx`

<!-- TOOLS_MCP_END -->
